item.name: Giant Snakehead
item.description:
Easily mistaken for a mighty scalekin, this vibrant fish can be found in Mu Springs Eternal.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Possessing primitive lungs, this sizable fish is often seen surfacing for air. When observing such behavior, even the most experienced naturalists have been known to mistake its blunt head for that of a scalekin.
